description:
A component that connects to Amazon Bedrock, providing access to a range 
of foundation models from leading AI providers through a unified AWS interface. 
It supports text generation, summarization, classification, and other natural language 
processing tasks. With flexible model selection and secure, serverless deployment, the 
component integrates seamlessly into AWS-powered pipelines, offering scalable, 
enterprise-ready AI capabilities without managing infrastructure.

accessKey.description: This is a key which gives access to your AWS resources. It is provided by the service provider. It is used to sign the requests you send to Amazon S3.
accessKey.title: Access key

model.description: Bedrock LLM model name or ARN for custom or provisioned models
model.title: Model
